name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in laravel-hoist
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

### Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

### Steps to Reproduce

Provide a minimal code sample or steps that reproduce the issue.

```php
// e.g. defining a Feature class, calling Hoist::all(), using an attribute, etc.
```

1. Configure '...'
2. Call '...'
3. See the error.

### Expected Behavior

Explain what you expected to happen.

### Actual Behavior

What actually happened? Include stack traces, exception messages, or relevant log output.

```
// Paste stack trace / error output here
```

### Environment

- Package version: [e.g., 1.3.0]
- Laravel version: [e.g., 11.x, 12.x, 13.x]
- Laravel Pennant version: [e.g., 1.x]
- PHP version: [e.g., 8.3, 8.4, 8.5]
- OS: [e.g., macOS, Linux, Windows/WSL]

### Relevant Configuration

If applicable, share your `config/hoist.php` overrides, your `feature_directories` map, or your Feature class definition (including attributes / properties).

### Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (related packages, custom stubs, namespace setup, etc.).
